projects.title: Messaging Platform
projects.description: Built a messenger using Flask (Python) as back-end and HTML-CSS-JS as front-end for real-time text-based communication. Implemented real-time chat using WebSockets for instant message delivery and integrated a MySQL database for user authentication and message storage.

projects.title: Credit Risk Modelling
projects.description: Built a Credit Risk Model in partnership with American Express. Explored various ML models including Logistic Regression, Random Forest, XGBoost. Achieved 75% test accuracy for the prediction of loan default likelihood by tuning a LightGBM model.

projects.title: Music Genre Recognition
projects.description: Designed a Neural Net that classifies audio files to 10 genres, using a training dataset of 10K audio files. Extracted MFCC components and experimented with LSTM and CNN. Achieved 91% test accuracy by tuning an 11-layer CNN model.

projects.title: Fruit Ninja - Desktop
projects.description: Implemented a desktop video game inspired by the popular mobile game ‘Fruit Ninja’. Developed the game using python’s Pygame library to deploy graphics, game controls, and sound effects.

projects.title: Portfolio Optimization
projects.description: Conceptualized and implemented a workflow to pull the latest stock data from NSE, calculate returns and find the best performing stocks. Heavily uses multi-threading to process vast quantities of time-series data.
